watching.title: Captive state (2019)
watching.thoughts: When I first watched this movie, I didn't really understand it. But on this rewatch, I was blown away by how well it captures the feeling of living under an oppressive regime and the moral complexities of resistance. John Goodman is the GOAT!! This one is a must watch, especially in the current global political climate.

playing.title: Evil West
playing.thoughts: Enjoying the combat system so far. Not perfect but the feedback of the gunplay is satisfying.
